title: geum virginianum
intro: Geum virginianum, also known as the Woodland Avens or Virginia Avens, is a perennial plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geum virginianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
